final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of a warm family gathering around a hot pot dinner.

Style/medium: needs a cozy, documentary-style aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include a round Chinese dining table as the focal point, family members raising glasses in a toast
Subject: must include a family group gathered around the table, hot pot steaming in the center
Scene/backdrop: must include a wall covered with photos in the background, 中式圆桌 setting
Lighting/mood: needs warm yellow ambient lighting, a lively and heartwarming atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm, inviting direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve the 烟火气 (lively, bustling) and 幸福感 (sense of happiness) mood
Avoid:
